title: Create: Sky Village
description: Launch two new sky villages in the sky filled with create loot! Requires Create
body:
**Update (0.0.35) brings a new sky village to your Minecraft server! Highwind Village check it out now in the new update. only available for 1.20.1 or 1.21.1**

![village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25716d51de86cdbad5561fe461164efd6ba33073_0.webp)
![village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a67378b741dc909bd5afc20edaf2f375aed40e8.jpeg)
![village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3447ec24a0daf2a951d92758e1a8dea6093a8916_0.webp)

**Create: Sky Village** is a unique Minecraft mod that elevates your building and exploration experience—literally! This mod generates majestic, floating villages high in the sky, offering a whole new level of adventure. Harness the power of the Create mod’s mechanical ingenuity to traverse, interact with, and expand these aerial settlements.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![create](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d6ed06eb9f7e0a3a02ad516bbffc280fb4746b9_0.webp)

FABRIC API IS REQUIRED FOR THE FABRIC VERSION!

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**Short description:**
Sky village, adds a village that spawns high in the sky! all buildings are made from the building blocks of create. 

Thanks to LuluBelleMC ( YouTube ) for showcasing the mod! 
[ LuluBelleMC](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wQgtZm1qLwI)


![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d976383817adb8765aa7087ca9c71f7a7229b724.png)
![sky village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85f563ea34603cda338577e58e38dd6e76b49e5b.png)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
